title: Racconti romani
writer: Alberto Moravia, Sergio Amidei, Agenore Incrocci
actors: Antonio Cifariello, Franco Fabrizi, Giovanna Ralli
plot: Alvaro is been in jail, so he consider himself the most fit to lead his three friends Mario, Otello, and Spartaco. The four young men decide to start a business. They only need a van to start a transport company. But they lack the...
